title: Trump doubles down on push for control over Greenland as Denmark vows to defend it
summary_full: U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday said the U.S. needs to control Greenland “for the protection of the world."
summary_public: U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday said the U.S. needs to control Greenland “for the protection of the world."

GL.label: negative
GL.evidence: Trump doubles down on push for control over Greenland
